name: EvergreenRequisition
description: An evergreen requisition represents an ongoing hiring need without a specific number of openings or close date, used to maintain a continuous candidate pipeline.

id.description: Workday ID (WID) uniquely identifying the evergreen requisition

status.description: Current status of the evergreen requisition
